title: thebasics:thebasics-handbook-title-player-stats
text: Player stats are optional server-side counters. Server config controls whether the stats system is enabled and which counters are tracked. Player command - /playerstats [player] or /pstats [player]: view your stats or another online player's stats when enabled. Tracked stats Stats can include deaths, player kills, NPC kills, blocks broken, and distance travelled. Each counter can be enabled or disabled by server config. Staff cleanup - /clearstats <player> confirm: clear all stats for an online player. - /clearstat <player> <stat> confirm: clear one stat. Valid stat names include DEATHS, KILLS_PLAYER, KILLS_NPC, BLOCK_BREAKS, and DISTANCE_TRAVELLED. The clear commands require the configured player-stat clear privilege.
